creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
I wonder if you're using latest ports tree. 

Even if you're building gdal 2.1.2, you should see something like:

c++ -fstack-protector gdalinfo_bin.o  -L/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/gdal/work/gdal-2.1.3 -lgdal  -ljson-c -ljasper -lgif -ljpeg -lgeotiff -ltiff -lpng -llzma -lz -L/usr -L/usr/lib -lpthread -lm -lrt -L/usr/local/lib                     -o gdalinfo
